claims.statement: vercel.json ships the exact byte-for-byte global Content-Security-Policy (no wildcards, no unsafe-eval)
admin auth enforces session, origin, and readiness gates before any admin database or client work
the DM chat endpoint enforces the DM rate limit before model work
PLAYLIST_SLUGS defines exactly 6 library filter slugs backing /library/[filter]
claims.check: node --import tsx -e 'import("./src/data/catalog.ts").then((m) => { const n = Object.keys(m.PLAYLIST_SLUGS).length; if (n !== 6) { console.error("expected 6 playlist slugs, got " + n); process.exit(1); } })'

claims.statement: resolvePublicProjectSourceModeFromEnv returns database for real Vercel execution (build and runtime) and catalog_development offline
claims.check: node --import tsx -e 'import("./src/lib/public-project-source-mode.ts").then((m) => { const a = m.resolvePublicProjectSourceModeFromEnv({ VERCEL: "1", CI: "1" }); const b = m.resolvePublicProjectSourceModeFromEnv({ VERCEL: "1", VERCEL_REGION: "iad1" }); const c = m.resolvePublicProjectSourceModeFromEnv({}); process.exit(a === "database" && b === "database" && c === "catalog_development" ? 0 : 1); })'

claims.statement: ADR 0001's decision that /projects 301-redirects to /library is still wired in vercel.json
claims.check: node -e 'const fs = require("node:fs"); const adr = fs.readFileSync("adr/0001-landing-and-entry-ia.md", "utf8"); const documented = /\|\s*`\/projects`\s*\|\s*`\/library`\s*\|\s*301\s*\|/.test(adr); const config = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("vercel.json", "utf8")); const rule = (config.redirects || []).find((r) => r.source === "/projects"); const wired = Boolean(rule) && rule.destination === "/library" && rule.permanent === true; process.exit(documented && wired ? 0 : 1);'

claims.statement: ADR 0001's rule that "all" is never added to PLAYLIST_SLUGS still holds in catalog.ts
claims.check: node --import tsx -e 'Promise.all([import("node:fs"), import("./src/data/catalog.ts")]).then(([fs, m]) => { const adr = fs.readFileSync("adr/0001-landing-and-entry-ia.md", "utf8"); const documented = /Do \*\*not\*\* add [^\n]*PLAYLIST_SLUGS/.test(adr); const codeHonors = !Object.hasOwn(m.PLAYLIST_SLUGS, "all"); process.exit(documented && codeHonors ? 0 : 1); })'

claims.statement: the DM release command consumes live Luna and Grok conversations for three runs per case, and canned unit answers cannot produce a release score
